1 Students with prior programming experience may take PHYS474, an upper-level, computational physics course, instead of PHYS265. This

advanced course may be used for an Advanced Physics Elective as well.

2 PHYS405 in The Physics Major may be replaced by the two course sequence: PHYS406, PHYS407.

3 Students completing a second major from a CMNS or Engineering department may use an upper-level course from that program in place of one of the Advanced Physics Electives.
